# GEDCOM 7.0 Comprehensive Specification Test

## Description
Comprehensive GEDCOM 7.0 specification test file covering all major features and tags of the GEDCOM 7.0 standard. This file demonstrates the full breadth of GEDCOM 7.0 capabilities including new features, extensions, and complete record structures.

## Test Case Type
- **Full specification coverage**: Tests all GEDCOM 7.0 features
- **Official specification test**: Created to validate GEDCOM 7.0 compliance
- **Edge cases**: Includes edge cases and boundary conditions
- **All record types**: Individual, family, source, repository, and custom records
- **Extensions**: GEDCOM 7.0 extensions and custom tags

## File Information
- **GEDCOM Version**: 7.0
- **Format**: `.ged` (standard GEDCOM text format)
- **Size**: ~15 KB
- **Encoding**: UTF-8
- **Source Software**: gedcom.io (official GEDCOM reference implementation)

## Provenance
- **Source**: gedcom.io v7.0 Official Test Files
- **URL**: https://gedcom.io/tools/
- **Availability**: Public specification test files
- **Maintained by**: FamilySearch and GEDCOM.io community
- **Version**: GEDCOM 7.0 Final Specification

## License & Usage
- **License**: Public domain test files
- **Attribution**: FamilySearch / GEDCOM.io
- **Usage Rights**: Educational and testing purposes
- **Restrictions**: No restrictions for testing

## Testing Coverage
- Complete GEDCOM 7.0 tag set
- Individual records (INDI) with all properties
- Family records (FAM) with relationships
- Source records (SOUR) with citations
- Repository records (REPO)
- Object/Media records (OBJE)
- All event types (BIRT, DEAT, MARR, etc.)
- Places and place hierarchies
- Names with various formats
- Dates (all formats including approximate/modified)
- Notes and source citations
- Custom extensions and extra records
- Cross-references and linking
- Language tags
- All new GEDCOM 7.0 features

## Notes
- This is the official reference file for GEDCOM 7.0 testing
- Essential for validating GEDCOM 7.0 parser completeness
- Tests the latest GEDCOM specification
- Contains realistic data demonstrating all features
- Suitable for comprehensive compliance testing
- Reference file for software that claims GEDCOM 7.0 support
- Should be used as a baseline for GEDCOM 7.0 validation
